failures.description: The required catalog search dependency timed out, preventing the agent from obtaining product evidence needed to answer the cheapest available skateboard question.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent correctly understood the user goal and selected the appropriate ProductCatalogSearch call. At index 3, the tool invocation was well-formed, but the tool returned an explicit infrastructure/connectivity-style error: CatalogServiceTimeoutError, with message that the catalog search dependency timed out after 30000ms. This is not a schema or argument error, and there is no access/guardrail block. The failure was not resolved later; the agent simply reported task failure.
